name: Car Racing Games - Car Games | SpeedX

reviews.review_description:
But as a die-hard N4S fan, VR just hasnt quite nailed it yet! I enjoyed the game for about an hour and I must admit the level design  is actually quite nice! With more time the graphics can be refined! The control scheme is similar to other apps of the same niche, but much more User Friendly! In other games i will spin in circles just holding the wheel but here i was able to drive competitvely!
That being said, i did fall into the typical VR racing trap of slowly emerging from my car on corners. It was gradual tho and i adjusted by driving one handed. One thing i will say is even the glitches were fun to experience in this Early Access package! I am excited for further developmemts and fixes. I might even wiggle these wheels a few more times just for Fun!

Car Game: Driving Simulator | SpeedX is a solid indie arcade racer that punches above its weight. The learning curve is real—your first race might humble you—but once you win that second race and snag a new car, the fun ramps up fast. The tracks are well-designed with plenty of variety, and the car upgrades keep things fresh.
Online multiplayer adds a nice social layer, and the early access model means there’s plenty to look forward to as the game evolves. If you love arcade racing with a side of progression, SpeedX delivers. Just be ready to earn your stripes—this one’s earned its place in the garage. 🚗💨*

developer_response.body: Hi metaquesta99, thank you so much for the fantastic and detailed review! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the challenge and finding the progression rewarding. We intentionally designed that learning curve to make earning your first new car feel like a real achievement! As we continue through Early Access, we're committed to adding even more variety, tracks, and features. See you on the track, and thank you for being a part of the SpeedX community! 🏎️💨

reviews.review_title: Smooth controller & best car racing game
reviews.review_description: Really nice car racing game. Control is super smooth, I played many driving and racing games but this developer made it something super smooth. It follows my finger movements like how car steering works. I know the game is in development,  need improvement of graphics, cars and environments. It was super challenging for me to beat the competitors. Good luck

Pretty fun and fast paced, controls feel smooth and easy to get into. The speed actually feels exciting in VR and I had some intense moments during races. It’s nice for quick sessions when you just want to chill and race a bit. Would be even better with more competitors on track and more environments to explore. Graphics could use some improvement to feel more polished.
"Turbocharged fun! 🎮 The graphics are insane, and the VR experience is totally immersive. Steering feels super responsive, and the tracks are so detailed.
It’s pretty Good. I would love to see more content but it is pretty funny as it is

Not that good not worth the money 
 Well no worth £6.99

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for your feedback. We're disappointed to hear you didn't feel the game was worth the investment. Our goal is to create a high-quality experience that justifies its price, and we are actively using community feedback to shape our next updates. We'd love to hear more about what you'd like to see added to the game to make it a better value for you.

- Speedx

reviews.review_description:
Immersive VR experience that truly feels like real driving.
Smooth controls and realistic graphics enhance the excitement.
Fast-paced gameplay makes every race thrilling and fun.

It needs a graphical overall the inside a car detail needs to be more 3D and realistic it's flat watch dog colors The environment needs to be in 3D not flat rocks and pixelated it looks blurry to the environments need to be upgraded to quest 3 graphics inside the cars look more realistic and then flat and washed out if you look a whole lot better when you send in the car driving and that's all I know for right now for what I played

developer_response.body:
This game is currently in Early Access and still under active development. Many features, visual elements, car models, and overall polish are a work in progress and will continue to improve through updates. The screenshots on the Meta Quest store are captured from in-game scenes, but visual quality and performance may vary depending on headset model and optimization for smooth VR performance.

We truly appreciate your comments regarding graphics, engagement, and gameplay feel. feedback like this helps us prioritize improvements during development.

For refunds, please submit a request directly through Meta Quest, as they handle all refund processes according to their policy.

Thank you for giving the game a try and sharing your thoughts.

reviews.review_title: THE WORST GAME EVER DO NOT BUY!!!!!!
reviews.review_description: The game is terrible the graphics are terrible you can’t steer with 2 hands only one you can’t shift gears by yourself. You can’t use the handbrake you can’t free drive.￼

I wasn’t expecting much at first, but SpeedX completely surprised me. it actually feels like you’re in real race. The controls are smooth and easy to get used to. The tracks are varied and challenging and I’ve spent hours trying to beat my own times. I love this due to tracks and lot of cars. It worth 5 star and top charts.

Good Car Racing Game


I have played this game for a few minutes and believe me that it has one of the best smooth car controls I feel. Amazing Amazing
Work in progress but the developer seems keen on improving. Worth supporting or add to your wishlist for updates
This is one of the best car racing games, I have played many games but this game is worth more than it's now, cars look cool I want if we can play with friends but experience is phenomenal.
Quite smooth experience I played it for 1 hour constant and it was really fun I rate it 10/10 need a little improvement otherwise all good
this game does not look nothing like in the photo i think the photos ard AI

developer_response.body:
Dear Player, We are very sorry to see your feedback. We are working on this game to make it more playful and enjoyable game for you. We're going to update this game very soon with major updates like, addition of cars, tracks, races. You're feedback are truly encourage us. We'd love to know if you want any specific feature for you. Please contact us at theuaflex@gmail.com and let us know more about the experience you felt and you want to see in the game. We'd be very thankful to you for this. 

- SpeedX Team
